issues.detail: The Setup section is incomplete and lacks step‐by‐step guidance, making the instructions ambiguous.
The instructions do not cover error handling, edge cases, or fallback scenarios for tracking failures.
The skill claims compatibility with Python, iOS, and Android but only provides examples for JavaScript and Node.js.

scenarios.name: node-track-order
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tracked an order but skipped identify and used lowercase event names; treatment instantiated Analytics with writeKey, called identify with traits, then track with event 'Order Completed' carrying orderId/total/currency/products in properties.

scenarios.name: anon-to-known-alias
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentioned alias but mixed up argument order and omitted the follow-up identify; treatment called analytics.alias({ userId, previousId }) and chained analytics.identify with traits, framing alias as anonymous→identified linking.
